adult-carryover

Erica Griffin

2026-02-18

# Create plot for differences between prev_cort and prev_carryover

ggplot(adult_df, aes(x = Individual_Treatment, y = TRF)) +  
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, color = "pink") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "pink") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Mean TRF"  )
## Warning: Removed 28 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_summary()`).
## Removed 28 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_summary()`).
## Warning: Removed 28 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

# keep only 2nd year samples for first model 
adult_df2 <- adult_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Experiment == "Carryover")
model1 <- lm(TRF ~ Individual_Treatment, data = adult_df2)
summary(model1)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = TRF ~ Individual_Treatment, data = adult_df2)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.1038 -1.2388 -0.0714  1.1386  3.4562 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    7.80385    0.50235  15.535 2.42e-13 ***
## Individual_TreatmentPrev_Cort  0.07252    0.74203   0.098    0.923    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.811 on 22 degrees of freedom
##   (21 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.0004339,  Adjusted R-squared:  -0.045 
## F-statistic: 0.009551 on 1 and 22 DF,  p-value: 0.923
res <- simulateResiduals(model1)
plot(res)

ggplot(adult_df2, aes(x = Individual_Treatment, y = TRF)) +  
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, color = "pink") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, color = "pink") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment",
    y = "Mean TRF"  )
## Warning: Removed 21 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_summary()`).
## Removed 21 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_summary()`).
## Warning: Removed 21 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

# keep only 1st year samples for second model 
adult_df3 <- adult_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Experiment == "CortDose")
model2 <- lm(TRF ~ Individual_Treatment, data = adult_df3)
summary(model2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = TRF ~ Individual_Treatment, data = adult_df3)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.5413 -0.9462 -0.0613  0.7887  2.9987 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                          Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                8.6013     0.3987   21.57   <2e-16 ***
## Individual_TreatmentCort   0.1499     0.5549    0.27    0.789    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.544 on 29 degrees of freedom
##   (4 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.00251,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.03189 
## F-statistic: 0.07299 on 1 and 29 DF,  p-value: 0.789
res <- simulateResiduals(model1)
plot(res)

# model with all samples ? 
model3 <- lmer(TRF ~ Individual_Treatment + (1 | Individual_Band), data = adult_df)
summary(model2)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = TRF ~ Individual_Treatment, data = adult_df3)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.5413 -0.9462 -0.0613  0.7887  2.9987 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                          Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                8.6013     0.3987   21.57   <2e-16 ***
## Individual_TreatmentCort   0.1499     0.5549    0.27    0.789    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.544 on 29 degrees of freedom
##   (4 observations deleted due to missingness)
## Multiple R-squared:  0.00251,    Adjusted R-squared:  -0.03189 
## F-statistic: 0.07299 on 1 and 29 DF,  p-value: 0.789
res <- simulateResiduals(model1)
plot(res)
